abilities.name: Fillings Is Metal
abilities.text: This model may treat enemies with an Analyzed token as if they had the construct characteristic.

abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

abilities.name: Patchwork Power
abilities.text: Before performing a duel, this model may remove a Shielded token to add a suit of its choice to its Skl.

actions.name: Mechanical Punch
actions.effects: This action deals +2 damage for each raise instead of +1.

triggers.name: Disassemble
triggers.text: Target construct. When resolving, deal +1 damage and remove up to one token from the target.

actions.name: Electrical Malfunction
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Triggers on this action must be declared, if able.

triggers.name: Frantic Attack
triggers.text: This model deals 1 irreducible damage to itself. Declare this action again.

triggers.name: Throw Yer Arm At 'em
triggers.text: This model deals 1 irreducible damage to itself. Target is moved 3" away.

actions.name: Magnetism
actions.effects: Move this model its Sp toward the target.

triggers.name: Reverse Polarity
triggers.text: When resolving, instead of moving this model, if the target is a model, move the target its Sp toward this model.
